description.en: Intercepts this navigation, turning it into a same-document navigation to thedestinationURL. It can accept handler functions that define what the navigation handling behavior should be, plusfocusResetandscrolloptions to enable or disable the browser's default focus and scrolling behavior as desired.

excerpt.es: Intercepts this navigation, turning it into a same-document navigation to thedestinationURL. It can accept handler functions that define what the navigation handling behavior should be, plusfocusReset...
excerpt.en: Intercepts this navigation, turning it into a same-document navigation to thedestinationURL. It can accept handler functions that define what the navigation handling behavior should be, plusfocusReset...

description.en: Returns theidvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or an empty string otherwise.

excerpt.es: Returns theidvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or an empty string otherwise.
excerpt.en: Returns theidvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or an empty string otherwise.

description.en: Returns theidof the history entry. This is a unique, UA-generated value that always represents a specific history entry, useful to correlate it with an external resource such as a storage cache.

excerpt.es: Returns theidof the history entry. This is a unique, UA-generated value that always represents a specific history entry, useful to correlate it with an external resource such as a storage cache.
excerpt.en: Returns theidof the history entry. This is a unique, UA-generated value that always represents a specific history entry, useful to correlate it with an external resource such as a storage cache.

description.en: Returns theindexvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or-1otherwise.

excerpt.es: Returns theindexvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or-1otherwise.
excerpt.en: Returns theindexvalue of the destinationNavigationHistoryEntryif theNavigateEvent.navigationTypeistraverse, or-1otherwise.

description.en: Returns the index of the history entry in the history entries list (that is, the list returned byNavigation.entries()), or-1if the entry does not appear in the list.

excerpt.es: Returns the index of the history entry in the history entries list (that is, the list returned byNavigation.entries()), or-1if the entry does not appear in the list.
excerpt.en: Returns the index of the history entry in the history entries list (that is, the list returned byNavigation.entries()), or-1if the entry does not appear in the list.

description.en: Returns theinfodata value passed by the initiating navigation operation (e.g.,Navigation.back(), orNavigation.navigate()), orundefinedif noinfodata was passed.

excerpt.es: Returns theinfodata value passed by the initiating navigation operation (e.g.,Navigation.back(), orNavigation.navigate()), orundefinedif noinfodata was passed.
excerpt.en: Returns theinfodata value passed by the initiating navigation operation (e.g.,Navigation.back(), orNavigation.navigate()), orundefinedif noinfodata was passed.
